chargeback-plan
***************


Description
===========

A chargeback plan that allows Ops Insights services to compute
chargeback costs.


Available Commands
==================

* change-compartment

* create-chargeback-plan-exadata

* create-chargeback-plan-report

* delete

* delete-chargeback-plan-report

* get

* get-chargeback-plan-report

* get-chargeback-plan-report-content

* list

* list-chargeback-plan-reports

* update

* update-chargeback-plan-report
